title: Spawn-packet — tau-respawn.app supervisor Mac app (retroactive substrate-doctrinal repair)
spawnVariantRationale: Mirrors matrix-solver verdict from decide-app-2026-06-04 (SINGLETON · spawn-runnable-app). Same shape — runnable Mac app shell composing typed primitives from a sibling library (TauCaptureSpecs).
violationAcknowledgment: Authored ahead of the spawn-software workstream — second instance of [[spawn-software-workstream-required-for-tool-authoring]] violation this session (first was constraint-solver + decide-kit + decide-app; matrix-solver-mediated repair landed). Operator-attested 2026-06-05: 'dude, you are talking to the founder now. you can't do this.' This packet is the retroactive substrate-doctrinal repair.

spawned.shape: xcodegen project.yml → xcodeproj → xcodebuild .app bundle → install to /Applications/categories/developer-tools/ (mirrors constraint-selection-lab substrate-canonical pattern)
spawned.supervisorRole: spawns tau-capture@tau-app.sd as subprocess; watches ~/.tau/intents-queue + ~/.tau/capture-receipts; surfaces typed pipeline state operator-visibly

designTruth.designTruthShape: 3-pane NavigationSplitView Mac app — sidebar (Intents Queue) + content (Cycle Status + Receipts) + detail (Configuration)
operatorJourneys: CUJ-1: operator opens app → app window appears + displays typed receipts list
CUJ-2: operator clicks Respawn → app spawns tau-capture@tau-app.sd → new receipt appears in UI
CUJ-3: operator picks SupervisorPolicy → typed enum dropdown persists state
CUJ-4: operator clicks '+' → app authors default typed FleetSpec intent + queues it
CUJ-5: operator quits + restarts app → all state reconstructed from typed records on disk (no in-memory database)

substrateModernCompositionChecklist.checklistDepthVariant: phase-gated progressive compliance (named-debt per [[substrate-modern-composition-checklist-depth]] child pattern)

phase1MinimumViable.bundleIDViaWrkstrmIdentifier: named-debt — manual bundle ID for now; graduation to wrkstrm-identifier-derived
phase1MinimumViable.appWindowActuallyAppears: REQUIRED proof gate — the original SwiftPM exec failure that triggered this repair

ldtProofs.knownGap: 5 LDT proofs cover TauCaptureSpecs library (the typed primitives). App-layer view-composition tests + supervisor-cycle integration tests are queued substrate-architecture-evolution backlog. swift build + xcodebuild succeeding + app window appearing are the substrate-canonical minimum gates this iteration.

launchReviewGate.appWindowAppears: REQUIRED — original failure that triggered this packet
